description: Create a complex GitHub Actions workflow named build that handles repository pushes, pull requests, and tag creations. The workflow consists of multiple jobs: release, build, starcatcher-publish, and starcatcher-release. The release job creates a draft release if the commit type isn't dev. The build job compiles the project on various platforms and toolsets. The starcatcher-publish and starcatcher-release jobs handle publishing and releasing the project on starcatcher.us if certain conditions are met.
